title: Trusted by Teams That Value Clarity and Execution

items.name: Arief Hidayat
items.quote: Working with Anton felt different. He doesn't just build what we ask, but helps us think through the system properly. The result is something we can actually scale, not something we need to rebuild later.

items.name: Dina Kartika
items.quote: Anton helped us restructure our internal system into something much cleaner and easier to manage. The improvement was not just technical, but also operational.

items.name: Michael Tan
items.quote: What I appreciate most is his ability to translate business needs into a solid technical foundation. We didn't have to explain things twice, he just got it.

items.name: Rizky Saputra
items.quote: We’ve worked with several developers before, but Anton stands out in how he approaches long-term architecture. It’s not just about building features, but building something that lasts.
